# Trigonometry for height calculation

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for height calculation: If a rope is tied to a pole and forms an angle with the ground, the height of an object on the pole can be calculated using trigonometry. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
